1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

    instructions="Given a customer message related to banking or financial app support, analyze the user’s statement to determine the core intent or issue, then select the single most appropriate label from the following list of predefined categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds. Do not reiterate or paraphrase the user's message—output the appropriate category label only. Ensure your classification is based on the underlying issue or request implied by the text, not just keywords or surface phrasing."
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
